x.name: oliverb
x.bio: Tabs Chocolate (Exited) || Now building @Bustem__ → we hunt & kill copycats & counterfeits | Book a call below 👇

tweets.text:
Stop negotiating with broke people.

Watched a bouncer this weekend turn away a group trying to skip the cover.

Didn't argue, didn't explain, just pointed to the back of the line.

They complained for 30 seconds and left.
Line kept moving. Nobody else even tried.

Meanwhile ur

Ur ignoring the easiest revenue in ur business

Everyone's obsessed with:
> Conversion rate optimization
> New product launches
> Viral marketing stunts

Meanwhile ur support takes 3 days to respond and Sharon still doesn't know where her order is.

U don't need another funnel.

The internet made entrepreneurship look aesthetic.

Realistically it's:

Hard conversations u don't wanna have.
Fixing mistakes u made when u were tired.
Making decisions when ur even more tired.
Trying not to crash out 4x a day.

Nobody posts the part where ur refreshing Stripe
